texto: Filmmaking, like any other art, is a very profound means of human communication; beyond the professional pleasure of succeeding or the pain of failing, you do want your film to be seen, to communicate itself to other people.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kenneth Lonergan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “Filmmaking, like any other art, is a very profound means of human communication; beyond the profe…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, art, pain pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de pain e people.

texto: Many movies about people recovering, moving on, and redeeming themselves are really wonderful and inspiring. But I think the more sentimental ones that are less good make me feel isolated - like, if you can't pull yourself up by your bootstraps like the guys in the movies, there is something wrong with you. That's a shame.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kenneth Lonergan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Many movies about people recovering, moving on, and redeeming themselves are really wonderful and…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, good, yourself pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e yourself.

But I think the more sentimental ones that are less good make me feel isolated - like, if you can't pull yourself up by your bootstraps like the guys in the movies, there is something wrong with you. That's a shame.

texto: Adolescents show off. That's another way of wanting to connect with people. It's not an aspect of human behavior that we generally consider to be very admirable, but it is, in some way, a means of connecting with someone else and not being alone.
